prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large cyan metal sphere
  - obj_1: large cyan metal cube
  - obj_2: large brown rubber sphere
  - obj_3: small green metal sphere
  - obj_4: small blue metal cylinder
  - obj_5: large red rubber cylinder
  - obj_6: small purple metal sphere
  - obj_7: large cyan metal sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0061] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0062] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0063] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0064] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0065] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0066] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0067] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0068] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0069] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0070] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0071] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0072] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0073] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0074] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0075] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0076] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0077] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0078] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0079] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0080] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D distances between objects in these scenes. Let me carefully examine each image and the objects described.

Looking at the images, I need to identify the objects and estimate their 3D positions:

- obj_0: large cyan metal sphere
- obj_1: large cyan metal cube
- obj_2: large brown rubber sphere
- obj_3: small green metal sphere
- obj_4: small blue metal cylinder
- obj_5: large red rubber cylinder
- obj_6: small purple metal sphere
- obj_7: large cyan metal sphere (second one)

Let me estimate positions from the multiple views:

obj_0: left-back area
obj_1: center-left area
obj_2: center area
obj_3: front-center area
obj_4: front-right area
obj_5: front area (red cylinder)
obj_6: back area (purple)
obj_7: right area (second large cyan sphere)

Now let me answer each question:

[qrr_0061] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_2 to obj_3: obj_0-obj_5 is large distance (far apart), obj_2-obj_3 is moderate. >
[qrr_0062] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_2 to obj_4: Both seem large distances. ~=
[qrr_0063] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_2 to obj_6: obj_0-obj_5 large, obj_2-obj_6 moderate. >
[qrr_0064] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_2 to obj_7: obj_0-obj_5 large, obj_2-obj_7 moderate. >
[qrr_0065] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_3 to obj_4: obj_3-obj_4 is small distance. >
[qrr_0066] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_3 to obj_6: obj_3-obj_6 is moderate. >
[qrr_0067] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_3 to obj_7: obj_0-obj_5 large, obj_3-obj_7 moderate. >
[qrr_0068] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_4 to obj_6: obj_4-obj_6 is large. ~=
[qrr_0069] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_4 to obj_7: obj_4-obj_7 is large. ~=
[qrr_0070] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_6 to obj_7: obj_6-obj_7 moderate. >
[qrr_0071] obj_0 to obj_6 vs obj_1 to obj_2: obj_0-obj_6 large, obj_1-obj_2 small. >
[qrr_0072] obj_0 to obj_6 vs obj_1 to obj_3: obj_1-obj_3 moderate. >
[qrr_0073] obj_0 to obj_6 vs obj_1 to obj_4: obj_1-obj_4 large. ~=
[qrr_0074] obj_0 to obj_6 vs obj_1 to obj_5: obj_1-obj_5 large. ~=
[qrr_0075] obj_0 to obj_6 vs obj_1 to obj_7: obj_0-obj_6 large, obj_1-obj_7 moderate. >
[qrr_0076] obj_0 to obj_6 vs obj_2 to obj_3: obj_0-obj_6 large, obj_2-obj_3 moderate. >
[qrr_0077] obj_0 to obj_6 vs obj_2 to obj_4: obj_2-obj_4 large. ~=
[qrr_0078] obj_0 to obj_6 vs obj_2 to obj_5: obj_2-obj_5 moderate. >
[qrr_0079] obj_0 to obj_6 vs obj_2 to obj_7: obj_2-obj_7 small-moderate. >
[qrr_0080] obj_0 to obj_6 vs obj_3 to obj_4: obj_3-obj_4 small. >
